title: mascagnia hiraea
intro: Mascagnia hiraea is a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae, commonly known as the Copal Ball tree. It is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Mascagnia hiraea include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant include reduced inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and potential antimicrobial effects, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil for medicinal use.
